name: Student travel insurance for studying abroad
description: Parent asking about insurance for child going to study in USA

input.message: My son got admission in a US university for 2 years. He needs travel insurance. What coverage should we look for? The university requires minimum $100,000 medical coverage.

notes: Must recommend: 1) Student travel insurance (not regular travel), 2) Minimum $100K medical as per university, 3) Mental health coverage, 4) Study interruption benefit, 5) Personal liability, 6) Compare TATA AIG, Bajaj Allianz, ICICI Lombard student plans. Must mention J1/F1 visa requirements.
